faqs.question: What types of ants are most common in Bellmore, NY?
faqs.answer: Bellmore residents most frequently encounter carpenter ants, pavement ants, odorous house ants, and pharaoh ants. Carpenter ants are particularly concerning as they can damage wooden structures in homes. Our technicians identify the specific species infesting your property to apply the most effective treatment method.
